basic_details.job_title: TMC Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Nurse III Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for healthcare jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

qualification.details: Project Nurse III: Four Year Nursing Course (Bsc Nursing), Registered with INC/MNC is essential. Candidates must have secured at least second class (or an equivalent CGPA) in the course. Good Communication skills in English, Hindi & Marathi and experience with Microsoft office and basic clinical trial data management is preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC Project Nurse III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Nurse III position at Tata Memorial Centre is 17th June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Project Nurse III?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed a Four Year Nursing Course (Bsc Nursing) and be registered with INC/MNC. A second-class or equivalent CGPA is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Nurse III post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse III position is 45 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Nurse III position will receive a salary of Rs. 36,400/- per month, which includes 30% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Nurse III post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Nurse III position announced by Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the TMC Project Nurse III recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse III position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Nurse III role at TMC involves an initial screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does TMC offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the TMC Project Nurse III application?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned for the TMC Project Nurse III recruitment. However, it's always best to confirm with the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What are the preferred skills for the Project Nurse III role?
faq.answer: Good communication skills in English, Hindi, and Marathi are preferred. Experience with Microsoft Office and basic clinical trial data management is also considered an advantage.
